news.t: PCS Software Integrates Triumph Market Rate Intelligence Directly into Cortex Opportunity Manager and Backhaul Booster
PGIM expands fixed income ETF suite with launch of three actively managed corporate bond ETFs

overview.description: The PGIM Corporate Bond 0-5 Year ETF (PCS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund seeks to provide total return through an actively managed portfolio of investment grade corporate bonds from around the world, with maturities of less than five years. PCS was launched on Jul 29, 2025 and is issued by PGIM.

data.text: Carriers now have access to real-time market rate benchmarks, informed by one of the largest freight transaction networks in North America, inside Cortex. HOUSTON, June 16, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- PCS So...

data.title: PGIM expands fixed income ETF suite with launch of three actively managed corporate bond ETFs
data.text: NEWARK, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--New actively managed ETFs offer targeted exposure to short-, intermediate-, and long-term investment-grade corporate bonds.
